name: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
author: Jumpstile
description: Optional TeknoParrot setup and import helpers for validating UserProfiles, creating Arcade (TeknoParrot), and importing profile XMLs into HyperHQ.

capabilities.name: teknoparrot-profile-scan
capabilities.description: Validate TeknoParrot UserProfiles XML files and common setup paths

capabilities.name: game-import
capabilities.description: Create Arcade (TeknoParrot) and import UserProfiles XML files as launchable games

capabilities.name: profile-backup
capabilities.description: Create timestamped backups before profile changes

permissions.description: Read TeknoParrot UserProfiles, GameProfiles, Icons, and TeknoParrotUi.exe paths
Write timestamped profile backups when requested, and save the optional collection dat ZIP into this plugin's own EggmanDat folder when downloaded
Create the Arcade (TeknoParrot) system, link TeknoParrot, and add profile XML games
Communicate import operations to HyperHQ through Socket.IO

Read-only fetch of the public teknogods/TeknoParrotUI profile-code list, used to resolve dat-based registration matches. Falls back to the local GameProfiles listing if unreachable; never downloads or executes anything.

Optional, user-triggered download of the public Eggmansworld/TeknoParrot collection dat ZIP (community game-name/profile-code data, roughly 100-150 MB), used to resolve shared-executable registration matches. Only runs when the user clicks "Download Collection Dat"; the dat is data, never executed.

Read-only fetch of https://reshade.me to compare your configured ReShade DLL's version against the latest release. Only runs when the user checks for ReShade updates; never downloads or executes anything.

settings.label: TeknoParrot Folder
settings.description: The folder where TeknoParrot is installed. Once this is set, the plugin finds everything else it needs on its own.

settings.label: Games Folder
settings.description: The folder where your TeknoParrot games are stored. This is NOT your TeknoParrot installation folder -- it's wherever you keep your actual games.

settings.label: Collection Dat File (optional, but recommended)
settings.description: Helps the plugin recognize a lot of games that it otherwise couldn't. Optional, but recommended. Click "Download Collection Dat" on the plugin's Actions page to get this file, then paste its location here. Community-maintained by Eggman -- github.com/Eggmansworld/TeknoParrot.

settings.label: Control Overrides File (optional)
settings.description: Advanced. Only needed if you want to manually fine-tune how controls are copied between games. Leave this blank unless a guide told you to use it.

settings.label: Buttons Needed Before A Game Counts As "Set Up"
settings.description: How many buttons you need to have configured on a game before the plugin treats it as a finished example to copy from. The default works for most people -- you shouldn't need to change this.

settings.label: Crosshairs Folder (optional)
settings.description: Your own crosshair images for lightgun games. Leave this blank to use the 321 crosshair designs already included with the plugin.

settings.label: ReShade DLL, 64-bit (optional)
settings.description: Makes your games look better with optional visual effects (sharpening, CRT scanlines, color boost, and more). Get this file from reshade.me, then point this at it. Leave blank to skip ReShade entirely.

settings.label: ReShade DLL, 32-bit (optional)
settings.description: Only needed if some of your games are 32-bit. Leave blank to skip ReShade for those games.

settings.label: ReShade Preset File (optional)
settings.description: A ready-made ReShade effects file (.ini) to use on every game. Leave blank to install ReShade without a preset -- you can still turn effects on and off in-game by pressing Home.

settings.label: Per-Game ReShade Presets Folder (advanced, optional)
settings.description: Advanced. A folder of preset files named after a specific game (e.g. Daytona3.ini) to use instead of your main preset for just that game. Leave blank unless you need this.

settings.label: dgVoodoo2 Folder (optional)
settings.description: Fixes some older games that crash or show a black screen. Download dgVoodoo2 yourself, then point this at the folder with its DLL files. Leave blank to skip this entirely.

settings.label: Per-Game dgVoodoo2 Settings Folder (advanced, optional)
settings.description: Advanced. A folder of settings files named after a specific game (e.g. Daytona3.conf) to use instead of the main settings for just that game. Leave blank unless you need this.

settings.label: Download Game Artwork
settings.description: Let HyperHQ automatically download box art, logos, and backgrounds for your TeknoParrot games.

settings.label: Auto-Add Games On Startup
settings.description: Automatically add your TeknoParrot games to HyperHQ's library every time HyperHQ starts up.

actions.label: Run Setup Wizard
actions.description: Run the guided setup again.

actions.label: Health Check
actions.description: Check that everything is set up correctly.

actions.label: Scan Profiles
actions.description: Check your TeknoParrot games for any setup problems.

actions.label: Preview Registration
actions.description: Preview which games can be added, without making any changes yet.

actions.label: Check Collection Dat For Updates
actions.description: See if a newer Collection Dat file is available, without downloading anything yet. Optional, but recommended -- it helps a lot of games get set up correctly.

actions.label: Download Collection Dat
actions.description: Download the Collection Dat file, which helps the plugin recognize a lot of games during setup that it otherwise couldn't. Optional, but highly recommended. This file is community-maintained by Eggman (github.com/Eggmansworld/TeknoParrot) -- credit to them for keeping it up to date.
actions.confirmationMessage: This downloads a file (roughly 100-150 MB) that helps the plugin recognize a lot of games it otherwise couldn't. It's just data, used only to help with game setup -- nothing is installed or run. It's community-maintained by Eggman (github.com/Eggmansworld/TeknoParrot). Once it's done, copy the path it gives you into the "Collection Dat File" setting. Continue?

actions.label: Register Profiles
actions.description: Add any games that are missing from TeknoParrot. Your existing games are never changed.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will add any missing games to TeknoParrot. Your existing games won't be touched, and everything is backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Repair Game Paths
actions.description: Fix games that can't find their program file, when there's a clear, safe fix.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will fix any broken game locations it can safely identify. Everything is backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Device Survey
actions.description: Get a recommendation on which controller, lightgun, or wheel to use for each type of game. Doesn't change anything.

actions.label: Preview: Copy Controls To Other Games
actions.description: Preview which games would get their controls copied from a game you've already set up. Nothing is changed yet.

actions.label: Copy Controls To Other Games
actions.description: Copies your controller setup from a game you've already configured to every other similar game. The original game is never changed.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will copy your control setup to other similar games that aren't set up yet. Everything is backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Preview Crosshairs
actions.description: Open a page in your browser to look at all the available crosshair designs.

actions.label: Deploy Crosshairs
actions.description: Install your chosen crosshair images to all your lightgun games.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will install your chosen crosshair images to every lightgun game. Continue?

actions.label: Hide Cursor For Lightgun Games
actions.description: Hide the mouse pointer while playing lightgun games.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will hide your mouse pointer during lightgun games that support it. Everything is backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Preview GPU Fix
actions.description: See which games would get a graphics card fix applied, without changing anything yet.

actions.label: Apply GPU Fix
actions.description: Automatically detects your graphics card and applies the matching fix to every game that supports one.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will apply a graphics card compatibility fix to every game that supports one, based on your detected (or chosen) GPU brand. Everything is backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Check ReShade For Updates
actions.description: Check your configured ReShade file's version and signature against the latest release, without changing anything.

actions.label: Preview ReShade Setup
actions.description: See which games would get ReShade visual effects installed, without changing anything yet.

actions.label: Apply ReShade Setup
actions.description: Installs ReShade visual effects (sharpening, CRT scanlines, color boost, and more) into your games.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will install ReShade into every supported game using the DLL(s) and preset you've configured. Everything is backed up first, and your game files are never modified. Continue?

actions.label: Preview dgVoodoo2 Setup
actions.description: See which games would be fixed, without changing anything yet.

actions.label: Apply dgVoodoo2 Setup
actions.description: Fixes older games that crash or show a black screen, using the files you've provided.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will install dgVoodoo2 into games that need it, using the files you've configured. Everything is backed up first, and your game files are never modified. Continue?

actions.label: Preview Import
actions.description: Preview what will be added to your HyperHQ library, without changing anything yet.

actions.label: Sync Games
actions.description: Add your TeknoParrot games to your HyperHQ library.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will add your TeknoParrot games to your HyperHQ library. Continue?

actions.label: Backup Profiles
actions.description: Save a backup copy of your TeknoParrot games right now.

actions.label: Restore Backup
actions.description: Bring back a previous backup of your TeknoParrot games.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will replace your current games with the backup you choose. Your current setup is backed up first, just in case. Continue?

actions.label: Get Status
actions.description: Show a quick summary of your TeknoParrot setup.

wizards.title: Set up TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
wizards.description: Point HyperHQ at TeknoParrot, validate profiles, and preview the import before syncing.
wizards.completedTitle: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin is ready
wizards.completedMessage: Arcade (TeknoParrot) can now be synced from your UserProfiles folder.

steps.title: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
steps.description: This optional add-on validates TeknoParrot profiles, creates Arcade (TeknoParrot), and imports existing UserProfiles XML files into HyperHQ.

slides.title: Profile-based imports
slides.description: Configured UserProfiles XML files become launchable HyperHQ games without changing TeknoParrot itself.

slides.title: Arcade system setup
slides.description: HyperHQ can create the canonical Arcade (TeknoParrot) system and TeknoParrot launcher mapping.

slides.title: Backups before restore
slides.description: Profile backup and restore tools keep the TeknoParrot configuration recoverable.

steps.title: TeknoParrot Paths
steps.description: Point at your TeknoParrot folder. Everything else below is found automatically from there -- you only need to fill in the rest if TeknoParrot is installed somewhere unusual.

form.label: TeknoParrot Folder
form.helpText: The folder containing TeknoParrotUi.exe. Everything else on this page is found automatically from here unless you override it below.

form.label: Games Root Folder
form.helpText: Where your extracted games live (not a TeknoParrot subfolder). Optional -- used to register missing UserProfiles and repair broken GamePath values.

form.label: Backup Folder
form.helpText: Where this plugin saves a timestamped copy of your profiles before any change. Defaults to a Backups\HyperHQ folder under TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: Collection Dat File (optional, but recommended)
form.helpText: Optional, but recommended -- helps the plugin recognize a lot of games it otherwise couldn't. Use "Download Collection Dat" from the plugin's Actions page to get this file. Community-maintained by Eggman -- github.com/Eggmansworld/TeknoParrot.

form.label: TeknoParrotUi.exe (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if TeknoParrotUi.exe isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: UserProfiles Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if UserProfiles isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: GameProfiles Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if GameProfiles isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: Icons Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if Icons isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

steps.title: Choose import options
steps.description: Pick how HyperHQ should handle media and automatic sync for TeknoParrot profile imports.

form.label: Download media
form.description: Allow HyperHQ to download game logos, artwork, backgrounds, and marquees for imported TeknoParrot games.

form.label: Sync when database connects
form.description: Automatically sync TeknoParrot profile games when HyperHQ reports the database is ready.

steps.title: Register missing profiles
steps.description: When a games root folder is configured, HyperHQ can create missing UserProfiles from GameProfiles using the same no-overwrite registration idea as TeknoParrot Manager.

steps.title: Scan Profiles
steps.description: Check profile XML files for missing paths, duplicate names, and parse problems.

steps.title: Preview Import
steps.description: Preview the system, emulator, and games HyperHQ will receive.
steps.errorText: Import preview could not be generated.

steps.title: Sync Games
steps.description: Create Arcade (TeknoParrot), link TeknoParrot, and import the profile XML games.
steps.errorText: TeknoParrot games could not be synced.

steps.title: Setup complete
steps.description: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin setup is complete. HyperHQ will use these settings for profile validation, imports, backups, and launching.

slides.title: Ready to play
slides.description: Your setup state has been saved so this wizard will not open again automatically.
